instruction: 帮我把预算执行情况记录一下

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '部门'
ws['B1'] = '年度预算(万元)'
ws['C1'] = 'Q1实际(万元)'
ws['D1'] = 'Q1使用率(%)'
ws['A2'] = '研发部'
ws['B2'] = 800
ws['C2'] = 195
ws['D2'] = 97.5
ws['A3'] = '销售部'
ws['B3'] = 600
ws['C3'] = 138
ws['D3'] = 92.0
ws['A4'] = '市场部'
ws['B4'] = 400
ws['C4'] = 105
ws['D4'] = 105.0
ws['A5'] = '行政部'
ws['B5'] = 200
ws['C5'] = 48
ws['D5'] = 96.0
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/dept_budget.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 帮我把预算执行情况记录一下
从/home/user/Desktop/dept_budget.xlsx中找到Q1使用率超过100%的部门，追加到/home/user/Desktop/budget_alert.txt末尾：'Q1预算超支部门：市场部（使用率105%）'，保存

include: Q1预算超支部门：市场部（使用率105%）
